purpose: Classify Claude Code skill names that are intentionally not one-to-one in Codex so sync-attest can distinguish real drift from planned/approved differences.

migrate_with_guard.db-patch: DB mutation; require explicit user approval, transaction/backup plan, and no secret echoing.
migrate_with_guard.db-query: DB read; require read-only posture, least-privilege query, and redaction for sensitive data.
migrate_with_guard.odoo-inspect: Odoo metadata inspection; require read-only default and credential safeguards.
migrate_with_guard.odoo-query: Odoo data read; require read-only default and redaction for sensitive data.
migrate_with_guard.odoo-run: Odoo method execution; high risk, require explicit approval and dry-run/rollback guidance where possible.
migrate_with_guard.setup-env: 1Password/env writes; require explicit approval, portability warning, and no secret echoing.

claude_only_allowlist.dispatch-agents: External Claude Code agent dispatch/runtime control is not Codex-native.
claude_only_allowlist.init: Generates Claude Code project settings; Codex should use a separate init flow.
claude_only_allowlist.slack-notify: External Slack side effect; keep manual-only unless user explicitly approves notification.
claude_only_allowlist.tmux-terminal-control: Tmux pane orchestration is terminal-environment specific, not a guaranteed Codex API surface.
